tools.

zVReturn a list of module names used by pytest that should be

:/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/_pytest/freeze_support.py

package
prefixr
qnqF|
Iterate over the names of all modules that can be found in the given
    package, recursively.
        >>> import _pytest
        >>> list(_iter_all_modules(_pytest))
        ['_pytest._argcomplete', '_pytest._code.code', ...]
    r
